title: R1-SNAPSHOT SourceLockRequest
description: R1-SNAPSHOT authorization request. Requests human reviewer approval to capture a read-only Blackboard snapshot using pre-existing MCP channel. No MCP registration. No server execution. No state mutation. DESIGN ONLY -- no bb_* tools are called until approved.
constraints: R1-SNAPSHOT authorizes read-only snapshot only. No MCP registration. No server execution. No state mutation. No events append. No knowledge write. All mutating bb_* tools remain forbidden. Snapshot uses pre-existing MCP channel only.
